raw: Each pass admits up to 4 people at $5 per person. Children under the age of 18 are admitted free. Visitors must reserve timed-entry tickets online at gardermuseum.org/visit or through the Box Office (617-278-5156) at least 48 hours before visiting. For Museum questions, visit their website or call 617-566-1401

source_phrases.audience_policies[1].form: Children under the age of 18 are admitted free
